artifacts.name: database-schema
artifacts.description: Complete Prisma schema — all models, relations, indexes. Use to understand data structure and relationships.

artifacts.name: implementation-map
artifacts.description: Current implementation state — what is built, what is pending. Use to understand project progress.

artifacts.name: decisions-log
artifacts.description: Locked architectural decisions — tech stack choices, tenancy model, security layers.

artifacts.name: product-definition
artifacts.description: Product spec — entities, roles, workflows, security requirements. The single source of truth.
